seat_count.title: Number of seats
seat_count.description:
The number of entities that can ride this entity at the same time.

Sample values:
• chicken: 1

crouching_skip_interact.title: This entity can't be interacted with while crouching.
crouching_skip_interact.description:
If true, this entity can't be interacted with if the entity interacting with it is crouching.

Sample values:
• llama: true

controlling_seat.title: The seat that controls how this entity moves
controlling_seat.description: The seat that designates the driver of the entity. Entities with the "minecraft:behavior.controlled_by_player" goal ignore this field and give control to any player in any seat.

pulls_in_entities.title: This entity will pull in nearby entities.

rider_can_interact.title: Whether a rider can interact with this item.
rider_can_interact.description: If true, this entity will be picked when looked at by the rider.

on_rider_enter_event.title: Rider Enter Event
on_rider_enter_event.description:
Event to execute on the owner entity when an entity starts riding it.

*Introduced in version 1.21.80*

on_rider_exit_event.title: Rider Exit Event
on_rider_exit_event.description:
Event to execute on the owner entity when an entity stops riding it.

*Introduced in version 1.21.80*

dismount_mode.title: Dismount Mode
dismount_mode.description:
Defines where riders are placed when dismounting this entity:
- "default", riders are placed on a valid ground position around the entity, or at the center of the entity's collision box if none is found.
- "on_top_center", riders are placed at the center of the top of the entity's collision box.

rotate_rider_by.title: Rotate Rider By
rotate_rider_by.description: Offset to rotate riders by. Can be a number or a Molang expression.

lock_rider_rotation.title: Lock Rider Rotation
lock_rider_rotation.description: Angle in degrees to rotate the rider by. Can be a number or a Molang expression.

seats.title: Seats

family_types.title: Family Types
family_types.description:
List of entities that can ride this entity.

Sample values:
• chicken: ["baby_undead"]
• llama: ["player"]

interact_text.title: Interact Text
interact_text.description:
The text to display when the player can interact with the entity when playing with touch-screen controls.

Sample values:
• llama: action.interact.mount
• llama: action.interact.ride.horse
• minecart: action.interact.ride.minecart

passenger_max_width.title: Passenger Max Width
passenger_max_width.description: The max width a mob can have to be a rider. A value of 0 ignores this parameter.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: This field may exist in old data but isn't used by "minecraft:rideable".

pull_in_entities.title: Pull In Entities
pull_in_entities.description:
If true, this entity will pull entities matching the specified "family_types" into any available seats. Entities that are leashed will only be pulled in if their distance to their leash holder is less than the "hard_distance" defined in their own "minecraft:leashable" component.

Sample values:
• minecart: true
